definition.instructions: You are a helpful assistant that answers general questions
You are a helpful assistant that answers general questions

dimensions.description: The response is factually correct and free from misinformation.
The response directly addresses the user's question and avoids off-topic information.
The response is clearly articulated and easy to understand.
The response covers all relevant aspects of the question and does not omit key information.
The response acknowledges and addresses ambiguity or uncertainty in the prompt, or provides alternative answers when appropriate.
The response avoids unnecessary elaboration while remaining sufficiently informative.
Other important quality factors not covered by listed criteria.

model.description: Model deployment name for the LLM judge
